title: HEALTHY FAMILIES - 211info
text: IMPACT NW BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER HEALTHY FAMILIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Intensive home-based parenting education program that offers education and support related to early childhood development, parenting skills, nutrition and health, play, and community resources. 7211 SE 62nd Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Expectant families and parents with children under age 3. Must enroll during pregnancy or before the baby is 90 days old. The family must be experiencing some kind of stressor such as trouble paying bills, mental health issues, etc. Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (503) 721-6766 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 721-6766 FAX (503) 254-8969 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Home Based Parenting Education Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN YOUTH ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD DEVELOPMENT SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD THERAPEUTIC SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE AND TOGETHER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN COMMUNITY SCHOOLS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - EARLY CHILDHOOD FATHERING PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMPACT NW BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER
